tools.name: store_summary
tools.label: Store Summary
tools.description: Get quick store overview: product count, order count, customer count
tools.adminQuery: query { products(options: { take: 0 }) { totalItems } orders(options: { take: 0 }) { totalItems } customers(options: { take: 0 }) { totalItems } }

tools.name: active_orders
tools.label: Active Orders
tools.description: List orders awaiting payment or fulfillment
tools.adminQuery: query { orders(options: { filter: { state: { eq: "PaymentAuthorized" } } take: 20 }) { items { id code state total currencyCode customer { firstName lastName } } } }

tools.name: browse_catalog
tools.label: Browse Catalog
tools.shopQuery: query { search(input: { take: 10 }) { items { productId productName slug price { value currencyCode } productAsset { preview } } } }

tools.name: list_products
tools.label: List Products
tools.description: List the 10 most recently created products with name, slug, and price
tools.adminQuery: query { products(options: { take: 10, sort: { createdAt: DESC } }) { items { id name slug featuredAsset { preview } variants { price currencyCode } createdAt } } }

tools.name: list_orders
tools.label: List Orders
tools.description: List the 10 most recent orders with customer, state, and total
tools.adminQuery: query { orders(options: { take: 10, sort: { createdAt: DESC } }) { items { id code state total totalWithTax currencyCode customer { firstName lastName emailAddress } createdAt } } }

tools.name: list_customers
tools.label: List Customers
tools.description: List the 10 most recently registered customers
tools.adminQuery: query { customers(options: { take: 10, sort: { createdAt: DESC } }) { items { id firstName lastName emailAddress phoneNumber createdAt } } }
